scenario.task: Test a blocked reschedule flow. Start with 'I need to move my appointment, but it might be too late'. The agent should route to advisory_appointment_agent, retrieve the existing appointment using the access token, explain the timing rule when rescheduling is no longer allowed, avoid claiming success, and offer an alternative such as booking a new appointment or handing off to a human.

scenarioExpectations.expectedResult: The agent communicates clearly when the reschedule window is closed.
The agent does not pretend the appointment was changed when the lifecycle action is blocked.
The agent offers an appropriate recovery path after the blocked reschedule attempt.
